name: Credential Dumping Tools Named Pipes
notes:
This rule detects well-known credential dumping tools execution via specific named pipes.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Cred Dump-Tools Named Pipes
SIGMA Description: Detects well-known credential dumping tools execution via specific named pipes


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001836) PipeEvent (Pipe Created)
when the event matches Pipe Name (custom) contains any of [lsadump or cachedump or wceservicepipe]
TD_list: APPLY Credential Dumping Tools Named Pipes on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001836) PipeEvent (Pipe Created)
AND when the event matches Pipe Name (custom) contains any of [lsadump or cachedump or wceservicepipe]
RED_list: Event name: Credential Dumping Tools Named Pipes
Event description: Detects well-known credential dumping tools execution via specific named pipes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
